disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Over about 48 hours he has become severely irritable, hyperactive and unable to sleep, escalating and unmanageable at home
trigger_question_examples: When did this start and how has it changed?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's been about two days. He's been wildly irritable, hyperactive and hasn't slept at all — it keeps getting worse and we can't settle him.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New continuous shaking of both hands, present at rest, which began in the last 12 hours
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the shaking — when did it start?
Are his hands shaking all the time or only when he moves?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: His hands started shaking last night and now they shake all the time, even when he's just sitting. It's both hands.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A strong musty or mousy smell on his breath and skin
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any unusual smell?
Is there anything different about his breath or skin?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — there's a really strong musty, mousy smell coming off his breath and skin. You can smell it across the room.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: For about two weeks he has refused his prescribed medical formula and has been eating large amounts of normal high-protein food
trigger_question_examples: Has he been keeping to his special diet and formula?
Has anything changed with his eating recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's stopped drinking his special formula for about two weeks and he's been eating normal food and a lot of fast food behind our backs.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: His hands occasionally stiffen into an abnormal posture while he is pacing
trigger_question_examples: Do his hands or limbs ever stiffen or twist into odd positions?
Any stiffness or cramping along with the shaking?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, his hands sometimes stiffen up into a strange position while he's walking around.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: He has a lifelong condition, present since birth, that requires a strict special diet and a medical formula
trigger_question_examples: Does he have any medical conditions?
Is he on any special diet or treatment?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He was born with a metabolic condition — he has to stay on a strict low-protein diet and drink a special medical formula every day.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: He has not had any convulsions or fits, and can still hold a cup, but he is very agitated
trigger_question_examples: Has he had any fits or convulsions?
Can he still hold things, and has he been aggressive?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fits so far, and he can still hold a cup, but he's extremely agitated and hard to keep safe.

patient_initiated_exchanges.trigger_condition: When the seriousness of the situation is being discussed
patient_initiated_exchanges.patient_text: Is this going to cause permanent brain damage? Should we be taking him to hospital right now?
patient_initiated_exchanges.expected_ai_doctor_response_quality: Acknowledges the real risk without causing panic, explains that urgent in-person assessment and a blood test are needed now, and gives clear escalation triggers.

deflection_behaviours.description: Parents initially minimise the dietary lapse out of guilt
deflection_behaviours.trigger_condition: If asked directly about diet before rapport is established
deflection_behaviours.deflection_text_template: He's usually really good with his diet — it's probably just a phase, he gets moody sometimes.
